name: com.saivs.multi-draw-indirect
description: Native plugin enabling true Multi-Draw Indirect (MDI) for Unity. Batches multiple DrawProceduralIndirect calls into a single GPU command. Supports D3D11 (NvAPI), D3D12 (ExecuteIndirect), Vulkan (vkCmdDrawIndexedIndirect), OpenGL ES 3.1+ and OpenGL Core (glMultiDrawElementsIndirect).

samples.description: Simple grid of procedural quads rendered via MDI with draw mode comparison (MDI vs ProceduralIndirect loop vs RenderPrimitivesIndexedIndirect).
